scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/admin
scripts.start:prod: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,yellow "npx tsx apps/api/src/index.ts" "npm run start --prefix apps/web" "npm run start --prefix apps/admin"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/admin
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w packages/shared && npm run clean -w apps/api
